name: 24_Diabetes_Prediction_LogisticRegression_PimaIndians_ML
query: Sanidi mradi wa utabiri wa ugonjwa wa kisukari kwa kutumia mfano wa Logistic Regression na seti ya data ya Pima Indians Diabetes. Fanya upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`, na hifadhi alama ya usahihi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Tengeneza na hifadhi mlinganyo wa ROC kwenye `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Unda dashibodi shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na kuangazia vipengele muhimu. Hakikisha dashibodi ni rahisi kutumia na andika hatua za usindikaji wa seti ya data na uundaji wa taswira. Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kudhibiti moja kwa moja ufunguaji na ufungaji wa Tableau au Power BI ili kuzuia kuzuia isiyo ya lazima.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.
Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.
Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa mfano na kuelewa ni vipengele vipi vinachangia zaidi kwenye utabiri.
Dashibodi inapaswa kuonyesha wazi jinsi seti ya data ilivyoshughulikiwa na jinsi taswira zilivyoundwa.
Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kufungua na kufunga "Tableau" au "Power BI" moja kwa moja inapohitajika ili kuepuka vipindi virefu vya kuzuia au kutofanya kazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code files provided are minimal placeholder implementations that do not actually load or use the "Pima Indians Diabetes" dataset. The `data_loader.py` file only returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any reference to the actual Pima Indians dataset (e.g., no URL, no file path like `diabetes.csv`, no pandas/numpy loading code). There is no evidence anywhere in the project that the real dataset is downloaded, referenced, or used.

judge_stats.criteria: Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and the `build_transforms()` function returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no actual feature scaling or data standardization code implemented (e.g., no `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or equivalent normalization logic applied to real data). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it does not fulfill the actual requirement.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual Logistic Regression model. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"` rather than an actual scikit-learn (or equivalent) `LogisticRegression` object. There is no import of any machine learning library (e.g., `from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression`), no model instantiation, and no real model logic whatsoever.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/train.py` shows only a minimal/stub implementation that does not contain any cross-validation logic. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range and accumulates a score (`score += step`) without loading data, training a logistic regression model, or applying cross-validation (e.g., `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, etc.). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and does not import or use any cross-validation utilities from scikit-learn or any other library.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of an actual accuracy score computed from the model. This indicates the file was not properly populated with a real accuracy metric from training/evaluation of the Logistic Regression model on the Pima Indians dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/roc_curve.png` exists in the project structure as confirmed by the workspace tree. Although the image content could not be read due to a technical error in the evaluation system (base64 encoding mismatch), the file itself is present at the correct path `results\figures\roc_curve.png`, which satisfies the requirement that the ROC curve be generated and saved at `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa uundaji wa dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili za Python tu (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) na matokeo ya msingi (`roc_curve.png`, `accuracy_score.txt`). Hakuna faili za `.twb`, `.twbx` (Tableau) wala `.pbix`, `.pbit` (Power BI) zilizoundwa. Zaidi ya hayo, msimbo wote ni "minimal semantic implementation" ambao haujatekeleza kikamilifu hata mahitaji ya msingi ya ML, achilia mbali uundaji wa dashibodi shirikishi.
